concerns: Step 6 references `createBaseGeometry(shape, radius)` from polyhedraEdges.ts as reusable, but it is currently a local unexported function. Add a sub-step to export it before use.

Compound modes (cloud+wireframe, pointcloud+cubelattice, pointcloud+fractalgrowth) are not addressed. The occluder's depthWrite:true will cause wireframe solids to occlude point cloud particles rendered in the same scene, which may produce unintended visual artifacts in compound rendering modes.

Steps 6-8 say 'change edge and vertex material to depthTest:true' but this is already the THREE.js default (current materials only set depthWrite:false explicitly). The change is cosmetic/explicit-only — not a functional concern, but the plan implies it's a behavioral change when it isn't.
